message:
fix(util): use little-endian bytes in DetHasher consistency test

The test verified that write_u64 and write produce the same hash, but
used to_ne_bytes() for the write path. DetHasher's write_u64 uses
little-endian internally, so on big-endian platforms the test would
fail spuriously. Switch to to_le_bytes() to match the hasher's
canonical byte representation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
